name: Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited
analysis: TLX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 44% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$14.5600, stop A$12.6720, target A$20.2240 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
